case_title: STEPHENSON,LUCY B. CPA VS STEWART KATHRYN A.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON,LUCY B.  CPA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEWART KATHRYN A. $785.09 PRINCIPAL, $32.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $817.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $882.53 AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART KATHRYN A.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-09-1994, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $785.09 FILED BY STEPHENSON,LUCY B.  CPA AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART KATHRYN A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART KATHRYN A.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART KATHRYN A. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON,LUCY B.  CPA HEARING SET FOR JUN-09-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART KATHRYN A.
